# EzyHelpers

> Trusted and verified house help service in India. We connect families with background-checked domestic helpers including maids, nannies, cooks, drivers, elderly caregivers, and a dedicated Care Services division for home nursing, dementia, post-stroke and patient care in Bangalore.

## About
EzyHelpers operates two parallel businesses: (1) general home services (full-time maids, part-time maids, live-in maids, nannies, cooks, drivers, on-demand helpers) across multiple Indian cities, and (2) a dedicated Care Services division (nurses, caretakers, trained attendants) currently in Bangalore. Every caregiver passes Aadhaar verification, ID checks, in-person interview, and condition-relevant experience review before placement. Same-day placement is attempted across 16+ Bangalore localities. Free replacement is offered if the placement is not working.

## General Home Services
- Full-Time Maids
- Part-Time Maids
- Live-In Maids
- Nanny & Babysitter
- Cooks
- Drivers
- Elderly Care
- On-Demand Helpers
- Home Deep Cleaning
- Appliance Repair
- Pest Control
- House Shifting
